title: Waldemar Case in the Records

beats.name: beat_2
beats.desc: Selecting Waldemar as the subject due to his characteristics.

summary: A scientist explores hypnosis and magnetic forces in terminal cases, focusing on Waldemar's peculiar traits, leading to mysterious discoveries.
